title: Delete docgen consolidation backup files
body:
Remove backup files created during docgen consolidation:
- N5/scripts/_DEPRECATED_n5_docgen_with_schedule_wrapper.py.backup-2025-10-24
- N5/scripts/_DEPRECATED_n5_lists_docgen.py.backup-2025-10-24

Consolidation completed 2025-10-24. Safe to delete after 30-day grace period.
